name: agentrun-runtime-session-hard-cutover
title: AgentRun 与 RuntimeSession hard cutover 收束
description: 彻底收束 AgentRun / AgentFrame / RuntimeSession 模型残余：删除 FrameLaunchEnvelope 过渡字段、移除旧 projection fixture、将 owner bootstrap composition 从 session 层收束到 frame construction 边界，并清理旧测试。
creator: codex-agent
